lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਲਗਾ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਤਾ ਪਛੁਤਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sir lagaa jam ddandd taa pachhutaaniaa |
lines.english: When the Messenger of Death hits him on the head with his club, then he regrets and repents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਦੇਵਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar fireh devaaniaa |
lines.english: Engrossed in sexual desire, anger and egotism, he wanders around insane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਫਿਰੈ ਸੈਤਾਨਿਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bin poore guradev firai saitaaniaa |9|
lines.english: Without the Perfect, Divine Guru, he roams around like Satan. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਕਪਟੰ ਰੂਪ ਕਪਟੰ ਧਨ ਕਪਟੰ ਕੁਲ ਗਰਬਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: raaj kapattan roop kapattan dhan kapattan kul garabatah |
lines.english: Power is fraudulent, beauty is fraudulent, and wealth is fraudulent, as is pride of ancestry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਚੰਤਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਛਲੰ ਛਿਦ੍ਰੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sanchant bikhiaa chhalan chhidran naanak bin har sang na chaalate |1|
lines.english: One may gather poison through deception and fraud, O Nanak, but without the Lord, nothing shall go along with him in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖੰਦੜੋ ਕੀ ਭੁਲੁ ਤੁੰਮਾ ਦਿਸਮੁ ਸੋਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: pekhandarro kee bhul tunmaa disam sohanaa |
lines.english: Beholding the bitter melon, he is deceived, since it appears so pretty

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਢੁ ਨ ਲਹੰਦੜੋ ਮੁਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਜੁਲਈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: adt na lahandarro mul naanak saath na julee maaeaa |2|
lines.english: But it is not worth even a shell, O Nanak; the riches of Maya will not go along with anyone. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਸੰਜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa naal na chalai so kiau sanjeeai |
lines.english: It shall not go along with you when you depart - why do you bother to collect it?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਿਐ ਕਿਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵੈ ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: har bisariai kiau tripataavai naa man ranjeeai |
lines.english: Forgetting the Lord, how can you be satisfied? Your mind cannot be pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਜਤਨੁ ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਵੰਜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa kahu kiaa jatan jis te vanjeeai |
lines.english: Tell me, why do you try so hard to acquire that which you must leave behind in the end?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਛੋਡਿ ਅਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਰਕਿ ਸਮੰਜੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: prabhoo chhodd an laagai narak samanjeeai |
lines.english: One who forsakes God, and attaches himself to another, shall be immersed in hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਉ ਭੰਜੀਐ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal deaal naanak bhau bhanjeeai |10|
lines.english: Be kind and compassionate to Nanak, O Lord, and dispel his fear. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਰਾਜ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਸਟੰ ਨਚ ਭੋਗ ਰਸ ਮਿਸਟੰ ਨਚ ਮਿਸਟੰ ਸੁਖ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nach raaj sukh misattan nach bhog ras misattan nach misattan sukh maaeaa |
lines.english: Princely pleasures are not sweet; sensual enjoyments are not sweet; the pleasures of Maya are not sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਸਟੰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਮਿਸਟੰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਰਸਨੰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: misattan saadhasang har naanak daas misattan prabh darasanan |1|
lines.english: The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is sweet, O slave Nanak; the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan is sweet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗੜਾ ਸੋ ਨੇਹੁ ਮੰਨ ਮਝਾਹੂ ਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: lagarraa so nehu man majhaahoo ratiaa |
lines.english: I have enshrined that love which drenches my soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਧੜੋ ਸਚ ਥੋਕਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਠੜਾ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vidharro sach thok naanak mittharraa so dhanee |2|
lines.english: I have been pierced by the Truth, O Nanak; the Master seems so sweet to me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਸੁਆਦ ਸਭਿ ਫੀਕਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਨਿਰਨਉ ਡੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: aan suaad sabh feekiaa kar nirnau ddeetthaa |
lines.english: All other tastes are bland and insipid; I have tested them and seen them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਲਾਗਈ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਉ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: har bin kachhoo na laagee bhagatan kau meetthaa |
lines.english: Nothing seems sweet to His devotees, except the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਜਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਜੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal man bedhiaa jiau rang majeetthaa |
lines.english: The Lord's lotus feet have pierced my mind, and I am dyed in the deep crimson color of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਬਸੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan bharam dukh kattiaa gur bhe baseetthaa |
lines.english: Ignorance, doubt and suffering are dispelled, when the Guru becomes one's advocate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਅਕਤ ਜਲੰ ਨਹ ਜੀਵ ਮੀਨੰ ਨਹ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਮੇਘ ਮੰਡਲਹ ॥
lines.translit: tiakat jalan neh jeev meenan neh tiaag chaatrik megh manddalah |
lines.english: Leaving the water, the fish cannot live; the rainbird cannot live without the raindrops from the clouds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਭਿ ਝੂਠਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan tan man prabhoo binase sabh jhootthaa |11|
lines.english: My soul, breath of life, body and mind belong to God; all falsehood has left me. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣ ਬੇਧੰਚ ਕੁਰੰਕ ਨਾਦੰ ਅਲਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਕੁਸਮ ਬਾਸਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: baan bedhanch kurank naadan al bandhan kusam baasanah |
lines.english: The deer is enticed by the sound of the hunter's bell, and shot through with the arrow; the bumble bee is entangled in the fragrance of the flowers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਰਚੰਤਿ ਸੰਤਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਨ ਨ ਰੁਚਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: charan kamal rachant santah naanak aan na ruchate |1|
lines.english: The Saints are entranced by the Lord's lotus feet; O Nanak, they desire nothing else. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਣ ਸੰਗਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਮਿਤੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jeevan sangam tis dhanee har naanak santaan mit |2|
lines.english: My life is with the Lord Master, O Nanak, the Friend of the Saints. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖੁ ਡੇਖਾਊ ਪਲਕ ਛਡਿ ਆਨ ਨ ਡੇਊ ਚਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: mukh ddekhaaoo palak chhadd aan na ddeaoo chit |
lines.english: Show me Your face, for even an instant, Lord, and I will not give my consciousness to any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਣੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau machhulee bin paaneeai kiau jeevan paavai |
lines.english: How can the fish live without water?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂੰਦ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕੋ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: boond vihoonaa chaatriko kiau kar tripataavai |
lines.english: Without the raindrops, how can the rainbird be satisfied?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਰੁ ਲੋਭੀ ਕੁਸਮ ਬਾਸੁ ਕਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਆਪੁ ਬੰਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhavar lobhee kusam baas kaa mil aap bandhaavai |
lines.english: the bumble bee is greedy for the flower's fragrance; finding it, he traps himself in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਦ ਕੁਰੰਕਹਿ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਸਨਮੁਖ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naad kurankeh bedhiaa sanamukh utth dhaavai |
lines.english: The deer, entranced by the sound of the hunter's bell, runs straight to him;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਵੰਤਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲੰ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਅਰਾਧਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: chitavant charan kamalan saas saas araadhanah |
lines.english: They contemplate the Lord's lotus feet; they worship and adore Him with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹੈ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਅਘਾਵੈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: tiau sant janaa har preet hai dekh daras aghaavai |12|
lines.english: Just so, the humble Saints love the Lord; beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, they are satisfied and satiated. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਚੁਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: neh bisarant naam achut naanak aas pooran paramesurah |1|
lines.english: They do not forget the Name of the imperishable Lord; O Nanak, the Transcendent Lord fulfills their hopes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸੜੀ ਨਿਬਾਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਪੇਖੰਦੋ ਸਚੁ ਧਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak aasarree nibaeh sadaa pekhando sach dhanee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord and Master fulfills my hopes, and always watches over me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤੜਾ ਮੰਨ ਮੰਝਾਹਿ ਪਲਕ ਨ ਥੀਵੈ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: seetarraa man manjhaeh palak na theevai baaharaa |
lines.english: He is woven into the fabric of my mind; He is not outside of it, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾਵੰਤੀ ਆਸ ਗੁਸਾਈ ਪੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aasaavantee aas gusaaee pooreeai |
lines.english: My hopes rest in You, O Lord of the universe; please, fulfill them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਵਿਸੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: dehu daras man chaau leh jaeh visooreeai |
lines.english: Grant me the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, the desire of my mind, and my worries shall be over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਝੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: mil gopaal gobind na kabahoo jhooreeai |
lines.english: Meeting with the Lord of the world, the Lord of the universe, I shall never grieve.
